title: Issue Adding Project to Portfolio (Can't merge columns)

posts.author: dwong (David W)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, I’m attempting to Add Projects to a Portfolio but run into an error: “Can’t Merge Columns”. No explanation provided.

However, when I add another duplicate project, it adds fine.

Appreciate any insight or advice. Thanks!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey David,

Sorry to hear this!

I haven’t come across this before - by any chance are you able to send over a screenshot or screen-recording demonstrating this behaviour in action? I can take it with our team internally to investigate why this might be happening - thank you

posts.author: crystal.m.buell (Crystal Buell)
posts.cookedHtml:
